seoTitle: Kellerberrin vs Kendenup — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kellerberrin and Kendenup. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kellerberrin and Kendenup.
heading: Kellerberrin vs Kendenup — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kellerberrin, Western Australia and Kendenup, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kendenup has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Kellerberrin (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kellerberrin or Kendenup safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kellerberrin has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Kendenup scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kellerberrin scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Kendenup scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kellerberrin or Kendenup?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kendenup has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
